title: aloe hazeliana var. howmanii
intro: Aloe hazeliana var. howmanii, also known as the Howman's aloe, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Aloe genus and is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Aloe hazeliana var. howmanii include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into gels, creams, or oils, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties, or consumed as a supplement after proper processing and dosing.
